summary: Make v1 contract migration produce a valid v0.3.5 contract
description: Migration must add required_stack_version and preserve/link historical tasks so --apply can validate old .go repositories.
acceptance: migrate --apply upgrades representative v1 repos to a valid v2 contract
Historical task files remain represented in hierarchy

evidence.summary: RED reproduced missing required_stack_version and unlinked history; migration now repairs both. 89 pytest tests and make check passed.
